# ISIKO — Kodujemy sztukę.

## About
ISIKO is an independent Polish AI studio founded by Karol Zamarlik. We build open-source AI tools and provide technology services for businesses.

## Products
- **Meport** (meport.app) — Portable AI personality profiles. Drop files, answer questions, export to 20+ AI platforms.
- **bOS CLI** — Multi-agent AI system for Claude Code. 18 agents, ~65 skills. Marketing, sales, SEO, creative, analytics.
- **bOS App** — Desktop AI operating system. Visual agent management, AI provider configuration, real-time monitoring.

## Services
- Web design & development (websites, CRM, B2B panels)
- AI automation (multi-agent systems, chatbots, MCP integrations)
- Operations & process optimization
- E-commerce (online stores, payment systems, loyalty programs)

## Founder
Karol Zamarlik — developer, entrepreneur, AI systems architect. Former COO in retail chains and manufacturing. Years of experience in IT management, operations, and team leadership. Combines corporate and indie development expertise.

## Links
- Website: https://isiko.pl
- GitHub: https://github.com/zmrlk
- Meport: https://meport.app
